title: Bewitchment Tweaks
description: Adds vanilla invisibility to Specter Bangle
body:
# Bewitchment Tweaks
Adds vanilla Invisibility effect to the Specter Bangle.

# The Problem
The Specter Bangle from Bewitchment makes you visually invisible, and the Ambush enchant from MCDW doesn't like that, so I fixed it. But also some mobs still detect you because they check for the vanilla Invisibility status effect.

# The Fix
This mod adds the vanilla Invisibility effect when you sneak with the Specter Bangle equipped.

# Requirements
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Fabric Loader 0.15.0+
- Bewitchment
- Trinkets as well maybe, haven't tested it yet.
